highlights.en: High-load infrastructure and microservices handling 1M-10M RPS

highlights.ru: Ускорение сервисов в 2-5x, снижение потребления ресурсов на 20-30%
highlights.en: Improved performance by 2-5x and reduced resource consumption by 20-30%

highlights.ru: Оптимизация p95/p99 latency, CPU, memory, GC и критических участков кода
highlights.en: Optimized p95/p99 latency, CPU, memory, GC, and critical code paths

highlights.ru: Resilience: adaptive RPS limiting, goroutine limiting, timeout/context control
highlights.en: Resilience: adaptive RPS limiting, goroutine limiting, timeout/context control

highlights.ru: Переиспользуемые Go-пакеты: caching, singleflightx, preload optimizations
highlights.en: Reusable Go packages: caching, singleflightx, preload optimizations

highlights.ru: Генератор кода для стандартизированных метрик и улучшение observability
highlights.en: Code generator for standardized metrics and improved observability

highlights.ru: Улучшение monitoring, alerting и операционных процессов
highlights.en: Enhanced monitoring, alerting, and operational processes
Led a team of 4 backend engineers
Conducted 100+ technical interviews

highlights.ru: Менторинг, high-impact code review, участие в инцидентах и постмортемах
highlights.en: Mentoring, high-impact code reviews, incident response and postmortems

highlights.ru: Выступал на внутренних и внешних митапах и конференциях, делясь экспертизой по Golang и high-load systems
highlights.en: Spoke at internal and external meetups and conferences, sharing expertise on Golang and high-load systems
Decomposed monolith into microservices
Designed distributed platform architecture
Migrated legacy Java services to Golang
APIs: 80% gRPC, 20% REST
Built and maintained CI/CD pipelines
Introduced coding standards and engineering conventions
Developed custom linter for golangci-lint

highlights.ru: Распределённая VPN-сеть для прямой коммуникации сервисов
highlights.en: Designed distributed VPN network for direct service communication
Golang microservices for core platform (Perekrestok)
Improved request processing performance by 3-5x
Architectural improvements and design patterns
Monitoring, profiling (pprof), and SQL optimization

highlights.ru: Go и Python микросервисы для аналитической платформы
highlights.en: Built Go and Python microservices for analytics platform
Developed integrations for enterprise customers
Implemented data migration and transformation pipelines
Reporting tools: Excel, PDF, HTML
PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis, RabbitMQ

highlights.ru: Desktop-приложения и системы обработки данных (Python, Qt)
highlights.en: Developed desktop applications and data processing systems (Python, Qt)

highlights.ru: Аналитическая платформа и large-scale data processing
highlights.en: Worked on analytics platform and large-scale data processing
Applied multiprocessing, Cython, and GPU acceleration (CUDA)
ML models: classification, regression, segmentation

highlights.ru: Computer Vision и deep learning системы
highlights.en: Developed computer vision and deep learning systems
Built desktop applications and data pipelines
Worked on identity recognition and tracking systems
Conducted research on deepfake detection
